$comment: Press-conference YouTube channels. These are the official Premier League
and club channels where pre-match pressers and team news are posted.
The ingest script doesn't read this yet — the Creator Board's
'Manager quotes' tab currently filters existing signals to factual
kinds (start / bench / injury / penalty / setpiece), which catches the
press-conference quotes that creators have already relayed.
To enable direct ingest, extend scripts/ingest-youtube.ts to load this
list alongside data/youtube-channels.json and stamp source_type =
ALTER TABLE youtube_videos ADD COLUMN source_type TEXT DEFAULT 'creator').
Channel IDs are in the format UC*. Find one by visiting the channel
page, viewing source, and grepping for "channelId":
